selected_tasks.body_preview: - Issue #37 target areas: "Transport error recovery behavior" — no fixture exists for this. FIM routing (402), prompt layout (369), and cache metrics (004) already have fixtures. Transport error recovery is the highest-priority uncovered #37 target. - Existing transport recovery tests in src/deepseek.rs are extensive but not gated by an eval fixture: `transp
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: `cargo run -- eval fixtures list` shows 403-deepseek-transport-recovery in the list The fixture gates transport recovery tests; if any referenced test is broken by future changes, the eval suite fails Future trajectory snapshots show eval fixture coverage expanding from 26 to 27 fixtures Implementation Notes: Create a single new JSON file at eval/fixtures/lo
selected_tasks.title: Add held-out eval fixture for DeepSeek transport error recovery
